description: CNN model: ConvNet(1→32→64) with BatchNorm + MaxPool, 64*7*7→128→10. Adam lr=0.001, batch_size=128, 10 epochs, CPU. Compared to baseline MLP 97.84%.
hypothesis: A 2-layer ConvNet with BatchNorm (32→64 channels) will significantly outperform the MLP baseline, reaching 99%+ test accuracy on MNIST.
